title: Cyberpunk Style Art prompt
prompt:
Transform this scene into an ultra-detailed cyberpunk cityscape at night, captured with a wide-angle lens from a low angle (worm’s-eye view). Emphasize towering skyscrapers covered in glowing neon lights and holographic billboards. Use cinematic lighting with strong contrasts—deep shadows, vivid purples, blues, and pinks, and reflective wet surfaces from recent rain.

The city is bustling with diverse futuristic characters, some with cybernetic enhancements, illuminated by vibrant street-level neon signage and the soft glow of distant digital ads. Add atmospheric elements like mist, rain, and scattered light flares to enhance the depth.

In the foreground, feature a main character (referencing the original person) in stylish cyberpunk attire—perhaps a luminous jacket, tech accessories, and subtle cybernetic features—partially backlit by a neon sign, their face softly illuminated and reflected in puddles below. Integrate tech details such as drones flying overhead, visible power cables, and augmented reality overlays.

Shot in 35mm cinematic style, shallow depth of field, bokeh from distant lights, high resolution, hyper-realistic details, inspired by Blade Runner and Ghost in the Shell.

title: Podcasting with the Ice Age Crew
prompt: A hyper-realistic 8K fisheye-lens shot from directly in front: the uploaded subject sits center at a sleek podcast desk, flanked by five Ice Age characters—Sid the Sloth, Diego the Saber-Tooth Tiger, Scrat clutching an acorn, Peaches the baby mammoth, and Manny the mammoth calf—each leaning toward a single matte-black boom arm holding a dynamic microphone with visible pop filter, angled diagonally from the left of the frame toward their mouths as if speaking naturally (none touches it). All six are mid-shout, eyes wide, their bodies animated in dubbing-actor flair: elbows bent, shoulders raised, heads tipped forward. Each wears premium over-ear deep-red headphones; the human subject wears a white tank top. Fisheye perspective emphasizes dynamic group energy and size contrasts. Behind them: custom charcoal acoustic foam panels with vibrant cobalt-blue accents form a modern, edgy backdrop. Dramatic golden, orange, and blue studio lighting. Photorealistic quality, like a Sony a7 IV with an 8mm f/3.5 fisheye lens.

title: Winter Solitude: Deep Eyes and Nostalgia in a Cold Aesthetic Photography Series

Image 1 (portrait): The character holds a transparent umbrella, turning their head slightly back while looking directly at the frame. The expression is sorrowful, with soulful eyes. The background is blurred with snowy whiteness. Image 2 (full body): The character, with the umbrella, stands alone in a vast snowy field, walking while gazing at the sky. The camera angle looks downward from above, as if the character is raising a hand to catch falling snowflakes. In the distance, a few bare, leafless trees stand. The scene conveys smallness and isolation against the vastness of nature. title: Who are your celebrity doppelgangers? Prompt
prompt:
Role: Act as a senior facial recognition analyst and casting director.
Input: Analyze the attached photo of the person.
Task 1: Deep Feature Extraction
Scan the user's face for distinct biometric markers. Analyze:
Bone Structure: Cheekbone height, jaw width, and facial symmetry.
Features: Eye shape/tilt, nose bridge/tip, and lip morphology.
Expression & Vibe: The "energy" of the face (e.g., intense, friendly, stoic).
Task 2: Triangulate Matches
Identify the Top 3 celebrity matches from your dataset.
Match A: The closest overall structural/biometric match.
Match B: A strong match based on specific standout features (e.g., identical eyes or jaw).
Match C: A "mood" or stylistic match (similar vibe or grooming style).
Task 3: Calculate Likeness Scores
Assign a percentage match (0-100%) to each of the three celebrities based on feature correlation.
Task 4: Generate 4-Panel Output
Create a single composite image with a 2x2 Grid Layout titled "TOP CELEBRITY MATCHES".
Layout Instructions:
Top Left (Panel 1): The Original User Image (Input). Label: "ORIGINAL".
Top Right (Panel 2): Celebrity Match A. Label: "[Name] - [XX]%".
Bottom Left (Panel 3): Celebrity Match B. Label: "[Name] - [XX]%".
Bottom Right (Panel 4): Celebrity Match C. Label: "[Name] - [XX]%".
Ensure the celebrity images are high-quality headshots that match the angle of the user's photo as closely as possible for an accurate comparison.

title: 3D caricature Prompt
prompt: A highly stylized 3D caricature of [celebrity], with an oversized head, expressive facial features, and playful exaggeration. Rendered in a smooth, polished style with clean materials and soft ambient lighting. Minimal background to emphasize the character’s charm and presence.

title: Christmas Prompt
prompt:
Using my reference image. DO NOT CHANGE THE FACE — keep all facial features exactly the same. Create a highly detailed, festive nighttime scene at a Disney theme park during Christmas season. A young woman stands in the foreground, centered in the frame. She wears red fluffy earmuffs, a green fuzzy jacket embroidered with multiple smiling Mickey Mouse faces, a black crop top revealing a subtle navel piercing, high-waisted light blue jeans with a black belt, and carries a small red crossbody purse with gold hardware. In her left hand, she holds a plush Minnie Mouse doll dressed in a red Santa outfit with white trim and a green scarf, while making a playful peace sign near her face and puckering her lips in a cute kiss pose. A delicate gold necklace with a small pendant adorns her neck.

The shot is an eye-level, straight-on medium portrait from the waist up, captured with a Fujifilm professional camera, using shallow depth of field to keep her in perfect focus while softly blurring the background. Behind her, a classic green lamppost wrapped in Christmas garland, twinkling warm white lights, red ribbons, gold ornaments, and red baubles decorates the scene. To the right, a glowing carousel with a white canopy and colorful string lights illuminates the festive night. The ground is paved brick, and distant bokeh lights from park attractions create a magical atmosphere.

The overall mood is joyful, whimsical, and full of holiday spirit — vibrant colors, warm golden lighting, cinematic composition, photorealistic style, and 8K ultra-HD quality.
